company_context: CockroachDB | Distributed SQL for always-on customer experiences The system of record to power your business CockroachDB is a cloud-agnostic, PostgreSQL compatible database built for modern applications that is the inevitable choice delivering unmatched uptime, scale and compliance - anywhere in the world. Start free Talk to our team Trusted by industry leaders to solve their toughest data problems and build what’s next. From AI to fintech, CockroachDB p owers business critical systems One platform. Four core advantages. Deploy and run anywhere across on-premise, hybrid, and cloud. On our cloud or yours. Enable state-of-the-art resilience. Survive regional failures with zero data loss, automated failover, and strong consistency. No runbooks and minimal maintenance windows. Online upgrades, schema changes, and backups keep everything running smoothly. Industry leading fintechs and banks rely on CockroachDB for continuous uptime across 50M+ users. Learn more about resilience Scale seamlessly. Eliminate manual sharding and scale effortlessly with consistent performance. Start small, scale to hundreds of nodes and petabytes—no app re-architecture required. CockroachDB enables CoreWeave to scale to trillions of objects while maintaining strong consistency and maintaining always-on availability. Learn more about scale Deploy global and compliant applications. Implement declarative policies to pin data in specific localities and geographic locations. Launch into global markets by enabling compliance and keeping data close to users to reduce latency. SumUp, a global fintech for 4M+ merchants across 35 markets, relies on CockroachDB to adhere to regulations such as Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA) without per country databases. Learn more about compliance Streamline operations and drive cost efficiencies at scale. Achieve high cost efficiency and consolidate databases on a modern PostgreSQL platform. Simplify migrations with MOLT and stream real-time updates to analytics across any environment, from laptops to Kubernetes. By moving from traditional PostgreSQL to CockroachDB, Riskified was able to see 83% lower query latency, 4.5x higher throughput and scale on demand all without requiring massive changes to their application code. Learn more about running PostgreSQL more efficiently at scale. Stay ahead of the game. Future-proof today Database Modernization Moving away from traditional data infrastructure requires applications and data that are agile, global and resilient. CockroachDB is a modern database that enables organizations to navigate database modernization with confidence Read the guide → Application Modernization Cloud-native applications, microservices and DevOps demand a fresh approach for managing and storing data. CockroachDB enables you to move to modern application architectures. Read the guide → Artificial Intelligence As other databases struggle to scale globally, degrade under concurrency and incur downtime with agents and AI

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi Alex, this is Sarah from DeepData AI. I know your time is valuable, so I'll be brief. I'm reaching out because we specialize in helping companies like yours, who are dealing with complex, mission-critical data systems, streamline their data processing for AI and analytics. I saw CockroachDB is powering your always-on customer experiences, which sounds incredibly robust.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Sarah, thanks for the call. We're actually pretty happy with our current data infrastructure. We've invested a lot in CockroachDB and it's serving us well. We're not actively looking for new data processing solutions right now.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand, Alex. CockroachDB is a fantastic platform for uptime and scale, and it’s impressive how you're leveraging it for those critical customer experiences. The reason I mention it is that many of our clients who use robust databases like yours are finding that the *processing* layer, especially for advanced AI initiatives, can become a bottleneck. DeepData AI integrates seamlessly with PostgreSQL-compatible databases, including CockroachDB, to accelerate that processing without requiring a full re-architecture of your core systems.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: "Seamlessly" is a strong word. We've had issues in the past with new tools integrating cleanly with our existing stack. We’re talking about trillions of objects and petabytes of data; the complexity is immense. What makes DeepData AI so different, and what's the ROI on yet another piece of infrastructure?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a fair concern, Alex. Our primary differentiator is our patented parallel processing engine designed specifically for massive datasets, which drastically reduces query times for AI model training and real-time analytics, often by 50-70%. We’ve seen clients achieve significant cost efficiencies by consolidating their existing processing pipelines and, crucially, unlocking new revenue streams by enabling faster data-driven insights. We can actually show you a benchmark run with a subset of your data to prove this out.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Benchmarks are one thing, but the cost is always a major consideration. We’re already paying a premium for top-tier infrastructure like CockroachDB. How does your pricing structure work, and are we looking at a significant upfront investment?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: We understand that. Our pricing is usage-based, designed to scale with your needs, and we often find it’s significantly more cost-effective than maintaining multiple specialized processing tools or facing the downtime and complexity of trying to adapt your current setup for advanced AI. Given the potential acceleration and cost savings we've discussed, I'd love to set up a brief, 30-minute demo for you and your lead data engineer. We can tailor it to your specific use cases and show you exactly how DeepData AI would integrate and perform.

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Price
Feedback: While the seller did a good job addressing objections, they could have probed deeper into the *why* behind the CTO's "happy with current infrastructure" statement before jumping to solutions. Sentiment: Positive
